title: Release bundle: CELLxGENE deploy + download + Zenodo DOI + CHANGELOG
context: M4 public release v1: browseable, downloadable, DOI-archived atlas under correct open licenses. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Produce the release bundle: CELLxGENE deployment, downloadable artifact, Zenodo DOI archive, and CHANGELOG, linked as the beneficiary-facing home.
acceptanceCriteria: Atlas browseable (CELLxGENE) + downloadable + archived with a Zenodo DOI.
README links the release as the beneficiary-facing home (Definition of Shipped met).
Release reproducible by an independent runner; CHANGELOG included.
output: /output/release/ (CELLxGENE deploy config + download artifact + Zenodo DOI + CHANGELOG)
